LAW AND MOTION, 302, PETITIONER MAIN STREET BUSINESS LOANS, LLC'S PETITION AND MOTION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD IS CONTINUED TO JULY 17, 2015 AT 9:30 A.M. IN DEPT. 302, TO GIVE PARTIES THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. PARTIES MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN JUNE 22, 2015 AT 4:00 PM. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). JUDGE ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK FELICIA GREEN (302/EHG)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Continued Hearing On Petition And Motion To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jul-17-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER MAIN STREET BUSINESS LOANS, LLC's Continued Hearing On Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed. Judgment to be reviewed. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition And Motion To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jul-17-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. PETITIONER MAIN STREET BUSINESS LOANS, LLC's Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award is taken off Calendar. Duplicate Entry. (D302)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition And Motion To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jun-22-2015 Continued To Jul-17-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER MAIN STREET BUSINESS LOANS, LLC'S Petition And Motion To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award is continued to July 17, 2015, at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302, to give parties the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Parties must deliver courtesy copies of the papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than June 22, 2015 at 4:00 pm. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)
